game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
UFO 50 is a collection of 50 single and multiplayer games that span a variety of genres, from platformers and shoot 'em ups to puzzle games, roguelites, and RPGs. Our goal is to combine a familiar 8-bit aesthetic with new ideas and modern game design.

UFO 50 is a collection of 50 single and multiplayer games from the creators of Spelunky, Downwell, and Catacomb Kids. Explore a variety of genres, from platformers and shoot 'em ups to puzzle games, roguelites, and RPGs. Our goal is to combine a familiar 8-bit aesthetic with new ideas and modern game design.

  • 50 BRAND NEW GAMES - These are NOT minigames or microgames! Although the size of each game varies, every one is a complete experience, from its opening title screen to its ending credits. Some are small arcade-style games but there are also larger open-world adventures and a JRPG that could take many hours to beat.
  • AN ALTERNATE UNIVERSE - According to the story of UFO 50, the games were all created by a fictional 80s video game company that was obscure but ahead of its time. Some games are sequels to other games in the collection and various characters appear in multiple titles as part of a shared continuity.
  • AN INSTANT LIBRARY - All 50 games are available to play at the start! The concept was inspired by multicarts, retro collections, and the experience of going to a friend's house and perusing their game library. Jump in and out of games at a whim - exploring the collection is part of the fun!
  • AUTHENTIC BUT ALSO MODERN - We carefully chose what elements to modernize. Every game shares a unique 32-color palette and we took great efforts to make them look and sound like actual 8-bit titles from the 80s. On the other hand, it was important to us that UFO 50 was fun and surprising for modern players, so we chose not to limit ourselves to the genres and design conventions of the past.
  • VERSUS AND CO-OP PLAY - Half of the collection features local multiplayer, including co-op and versus. You can compete head-to-head in a new fighting or strategy game... or team up to beat a classic arcade game from an alternate timeline. It's great for groups!


Here are some of games you'll get to play in UFO 50:



CAMPANELLA 2 - The sequel to Campanella (another game in UFO 50), Campanella 2 features procedurally-generated levels where you can explore in your UFO but also hop out to enter shops and dangerous caves. You play as the intrepid treasure-hunter Isabell, but she hasn't always been a hero - by playing the entire collection you can learn more about her past.



QUIBBLE RACE - In this unique sci-fi "horse-racing" game, the goal is to win more money than your opponents, but why stop at betting? Thanks to the seedy alien underworld, you can hire thugs to tamper with the race or even sponsor your own quibble to earn extra credits. But your opponents can do the same, so the question is... how well can you anticipate their actions? Up to 3 players can compete in this turn-based game of betting and bluffing.



PINGOLF - A fan favorite at gaming get-togethers like PAX, Pingolf is another fun multiplayer game that mixes golf with pinball. As you navigate 18 holes filled with bumpers, trampolines, and other crazy obstacles, a dot matrix display will light up at the bottom of the screen to cheer you on!



SEASIDE DRIVE - Sometimes you'll want a break from long, open-world games and challenging strategy titles, so why not jump into a straight-forward arcade-style action game like Seaside Drive? But even in a popular genre, UFO 50 brings something new to the table - in this case, Ojiro Fumoto (the creator of Downwell) designed a stylish car-based shoot 'em up where "drifting" across the screen is how you power-up your gun.



GRIMSTONE - Yes, there is a full blown JRPG in the collection! Grimstone follows many conventions from 8-bit console RPGs, but is streamlined for a modern audience. Also, to make combat more engaging, we added a skill-based component to battles and encounters on the overworld can be strategically avoided. The story takes place in the American Wild West, where somehow the land has been swallowed up by Hell! Creating your party from the ashes of a burned-down saloon, you'll be looking for answers as to why it happened.

And that's just five games! Out of 50! So come join us and enjoy this collection of 8-bit classics from another dimension! There's something for everyone!
game_info.description: Navigate through a procedurally-generated cave system as a treasure hunter in your UFO! Collect gems scattered throughout the caverns while managing your fuel supply. Land at fuel stations to refill, avoid deadly spikes, and return to the surface with your loot before running out of fuel. The deeper you go, the more valuable the treasure becomes!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate UFO (up thrust, left/right steering)
Space: Land/Take off at fuel stations
Shift: Boost (consumes extra fuel)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic UFO movement and navigation through the cave system. Validates that the player can move in all directions and navigate through openings without crashing.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the UFO through the cave system using controlled movements. Test vertical thrust and horizontal steering. Avoid obstacles and navigate through passages.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The UFO should move smoothly and respond to all control inputs. Position should update correctly and the UFO should not pass through walls.

TEST_1.strategy: Move the UFO through the cave system using controlled movements. Test vertical thrust and horizontal steering. Avoid obstacles and navigate through passages.
TEST_1.expected: The UFO should move smoothly and respond to all control inputs. Position should update correctly and the UFO should not pass through walls.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the optimal win strategy. Collect gems efficiently while managing fuel consumption, refueling at stations, and returning to the surface with maximum treasure.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to nearby gems first, refuel at stations when fuel is low, prioritize high-value deep gems when fuel permits, and return to surface before fuel depletes completely.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect gems, maintain fuel levels through strategic refueling, and return to surface with treasure. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state when returning with collected gems.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully collect gems, maintain fuel levels through strategic refueling, and return to surface with treasure. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state when returning with collected gems.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing collision detection with cave walls and spikes. Validates that the game correctly detects when the UFO crashes into obstacles.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately navigate into walls and spikes to test collision detection. Verify that the game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state upon collision.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game should detect collisions accurately and transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when the UFO hits walls or spikes.
TEST_3.description: Testing collision detection with cave walls and spikes. Validates that the game correctly detects when the UFO crashes into obstacles.
TEST_3.strategy: Deliberately navigate into walls and spikes to test collision detection. Verify that the game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state upon collision.
TEST_3.expected: Game should detect collisions accurately and transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when the UFO hits walls or spikes.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing fuel management system. Validates that fuel decreases during flight, can be refilled at stations, and leads to game over when depleted.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Monitor fuel consumption during flight, test refueling by landing at fuel stations, and verify game over when fuel runs out.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Fuel should decrease gradually during flight, refill when landed at stations, and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE when fully depleted.
TEST_4.description: Testing fuel management system. Validates that fuel decreases during flight, can be refilled at stations, and leads to game over when depleted.
TEST_4.strategy: Monitor fuel consumption during flight, test refueling by landing at fuel stations, and verify game over when fuel runs out.
TEST_4.expected: Fuel should decrease gradually during flight, refill when landed at stations, and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE when fully depleted.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing gem collection mechanics. Validates that gems are collected when the UFO touches them and score updates correctly.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Navigate to gems of different values, collect them by flying through them, and verify score increases appropriately.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Gems should be removed when collected, score should increase by gem value, and collection should be tracked in game state.

TEST_5.strategy: Navigate to gems of different values, collect them by flying through them, and verify score increases appropriately.
TEST_5.expected: Gems should be removed when collected, score should increase by gem value, and collection should be tracked in game state.
